title: Costa Coffee India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Costa Coffee India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Costa Coffee India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Costa Coffee India:
Costa Coffee India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India!
